title: Sutton's Case
overview: At his home in a rundown American suburb, detective Edward Sutton hears noises from his basement. As he explores the sounds he soon discovers that something terrible is going on. His detective instincts awakens quickly and the search for truth is becoming more and more intense. Before he knows it, he is in a complex situation where he himself becomes the victim of the basement and whats in it..
